results.product_title: Urbanstrive 16 oz Large Coffee Mug with Handle Tea Cup Novelty Coffee Cup Idea Gift for Men Women Office Work, White (White)
results.high_level_description: A 16 oz ceramic coffee mug with handle by Urbanstrive for coffee, tea and other hot or cold beverages. It is microwave, oven and freezer safe, dishwasher safe, and features durable chip‑resistant enamel with good heat retention.

best_image.reasoning: Chosen for zero occlusions with a clean, front-facing, centered view of the mug on a plain background. Other images are either angled/back views, include hands or props that partially cover the mug, or include packaging. Measurement overlay images are acceptable but do not surpass a clean hero shot when both have zero occlusion.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61Q4.notes: Lifestyle or multi-object scene; other items or hands partially cover the mug.

It is fiberglass-free, infused with green tea and charcoal to help keep it fresh, and uses CertiPUR-US certified foam with an OEKO-TEX certified cover; ships compressed in a box.
